description: Helium 10 provides software tools for Amazon, Walmart, and TikTok Shop sellers, including keyword research, product research, analytics, and advertising features. Its help center also documents an MCP integration that connects Helium 10 account data to AI assistants.
summary: helium10.com publicly documents a Helium 10 MCP server authenticated with Helium 10 account OAuth 2.0; no public HTTP/REST, GraphQL, or CLI developer surface was found on helium10.com, though a Portals Zapier API key is mentioned for a third-party Zapier integration.
